user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Northwind Traders.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-09 10:58 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 15:29 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Northwind Traders partner engagement

Our team encountered some challenges with partner engagement. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 15:53 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-01-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), David (Northwind Traders)

[00:02:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:05:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.

[00:08:00] David (Northwind Traders): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:12:00] David (Northwind Traders): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.

[00:16:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:19:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.
